feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Conducta - Digital FADER FORT 2

link.title: Conducta - Digital FADER FORT 2

entry.content: Hot on the heels of his newest project The Kiwi Sound, UK garage producer Conducta is determined to keep the bass boosted and the flag waving. For his Digital FORT performance, he brings things out of the garage and onto his balcony in west London to deliver a mix that splices together material from his label Kiwi Rekords as well as a heavy hand of new material that he’s been working on during isolation. It’s blue skies and even better vibes. Check it out above, and then head over here to donate to Conducta’s chosen charity, the NAACP Defense Fund.
entry.summary: Hot on the heels of his newest project The Kiwi Sound, UK garage producer Conducta is determined to keep the bass boosted and the flag waving. For his Digital FORT performance, he brings things out of the garage and onto his balcony in west London to deliver a mix that splices together material from his label Kiwi Rekords as well as a heavy hand of new material that he’s been working on during isolation. It’s blue skies and even better vibes. Check it out above, and then head over here to donate to Conducta’s chosen charity, the NAACP Defense Fund.

entry.title: ఏపి లో సగం కేసులు అక్కడి నుంచే.. Covid19 Situation In Andhra Pradesh Oneindia Telugu

link.title: ఏపి లో సగం కేసులు అక్కడి నుంచే.. Covid19 Situation In Andhra Pradesh Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
East Godavari with 14 per cent of the total COVID-19 cases in Andhra Pradesh poses an urgent challenge to authorities in the state, especially the cities of Kakinada and Rajamahendravaram have remained hotspots. But other districts in the state too are not too far behind. Kurnool, Anantpur and Chittoor are right up there.
#Andhrapradesh
#Coronavirus
#Covid19
#Chittoor
#Kurnool
#Kadapa
#EastGodavari
#Amaravati
#Ysjagan
#Amaravati
#Apgovt
తూర్పు గోదావరి, గుంటూరు జిల్లాల్లో పాజిటివ్ కేసులు రికార్డు స్థాయిలో నమోదవుతున్నాయి. ప్రస్తుతం రాష్ట్రంలోని 13 జిల్లాలతో పోల్చుకుంటే తూర్పు గోదావరిలోనే అత్యధిక కేసులు రికార్డు అయ్యాయి. 12,391 కేసులు ఈ జిల్లాలో వెలుగు చూశాయి. రాజమహేంద్రవరం, కాకినాడ వంటి నగరాలు హాట్‌స్పాట్లుగా మారినట్లు అధికారులు చెబుతున్నారు.
entry.summary: East Godavari with 14 per cent of the total COVID-19 cases in Andhra Pradesh poses an urgent challenge to authorities in the state, especially the cities of Kakinada and Rajamahendravaram have remained hotspots. But other districts in the state too are not too far behind. Kurnool, Anantpur and Chittoor are right up there. #Andhrapradesh #Coronavirus #Covid19 #Chittoor #Kurnool #Kadapa #EastGodavari #Amaravati #Ysjagan #Amaravati #Apgovt తూర్పు గోదావరి, గుంటూరు జిల్లాల్లో పాజిటివ్ కేసులు రికార్డు స్థాయిలో నమోదవుతున్నాయి. ప్రస్తుతం రాష్ట్రంలోని 13 జిల్లాలతో పోల్చుకుంటే తూర్పు గోదావరిలోనే అత్యధిక కేసులు రికార్డు అయ్యాయి. 12,391 కేసులు ఈ జిల్లాలో వెలుగు చూశాయి. రాజమహేంద్రవరం, కాకినాడ వంటి నగరాలు హాట్‌స్పాట్లుగా మారినట్లు అధికారులు చెబుతున్నారు.

entry.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 41 23rd July 2020

link.title: Mera Dil Mera Dushman Episode 41 23rd July 2020

entry.content:
‘Mera Dil Mera Dushman’ Is The Battle Of Love And Wealth
Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. Hence, towards the end, Mairah’s step daughter Ayesha consolidates the relationship between Mairah and Zafar.
Alizey Shah as Mairah is a young and beautiful girl, who finds herself at odds as her parents get her married to an older man.
Yasir Nawaz as Zafar is a middle-aged arrogant man, who marries a young girl using his money.
Related: ARY Digital all set to roll-out three spectacular dramas
Noman Sami as Shameer loves Mairah but is not financially strong enough to win Mairah’s hand.
But Life has its own balance; Zafar’s son-in-law is love interest of his wife.
Anum Tanveer as Shaeena and Naveed Raza as Javed are Mariah’s Brother & Sister-in-Law.
Zafar’s younger brother and his wife are opportunists who rely on his money.
Mairah is left with no option but to adjust with Zafar and her stepchildren. She struggles to keep everyone happy but faces rude reactions which make her life difficult.
Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama)
Written By: Mirza Asim Baig
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz,
Alizey Shah,
Noman Sami,
Laiba Khan ,
Amna Malik
Salman Saeed
Shazia Gohar
Anam Tanveer
Naveed Raza
Akbar Islam
Gul E Rana
Fareeda Shabir
Fatima Sohail
Saba Shah
Malik Raza
Asiya Irshad
entry.summary: ‘Mera Dil Mera Dushman’ Is The Battle Of Love And Wealth Mera Dil Mera Dushman is a story of a young innocent girl Mairah, who gets married to a much older man Zafar for the exchange of money. Unfortunately, she comes face to face with the bitter reality that her one and only love Shameer is now her son-in-law. Hence, towards the end, Mairah’s step daughter Ayesha consolidates the relationship between Mairah and Zafar. Alizey Shah as Mairah is a young and beautiful girl, who finds herself at odds as her parents get her married to an older man. Yasir Nawaz as Zafar is a middle-aged arrogant man, who marries a young girl using his money. Related: ARY Digital all set to roll-out three spectacular dramas Noman Sami as Shameer loves Mairah but is not financially strong enough to win Mairah’s hand. But Life has its own balance; Zafar’s son-in-law is love interest of his wife. Anum Tanveer as Shaeena and Naveed Raza as Javed are Mariah’s Brother & Sister-in-Law. Zafar’s younger brother and his wife are opportunists who rely on his money. Mairah is left with no option but to adjust with Zafar and her stepchildren. She struggles to keep everyone happy but faces rude reactions which make her life difficult. Directed By: Ali Raza (Usama) Written By: Mirza Asim Baig Cast: Yasir Nawaz, Alizey Shah, Noman Sami, Laiba Khan , Amna Malik Salman Saeed Shazia Gohar Anam Tanveer Naveed Raza Akbar Islam Gul E Rana Fareeda Shabir Fatima Sohail Saba Shah Malik Raza Asiya Irshad

entry.title: ¿Se viene la segunda temporada de ‘Oscuro Deseo’?

link.title: ¿Se viene la segunda temporada de ‘Oscuro Deseo’?

entry.content: ⚠️ ALERTA SPOILER ⚠️ Los cabos sueltos del final de la popular serie de Netflix ‘Oscuro Deseo’ hace creer a los fanáticos que posiblemente haya una segunda temporada. ¿Te gustaría ver más capítulos de esta historia?
entry.summary: ⚠️ ALERTA SPOILER ⚠️ Los cabos sueltos del final de la popular serie de Netflix ‘Oscuro Deseo’ hace creer a los fanáticos que posiblemente haya una segunda temporada. ¿Te gustaría ver más capítulos de esta historia?

entry.title: Rafale: First batch of 5 Fighter Jets land at Ambala airbase after covering nearly 7,000 Km OneIndia

link.title: Rafale: First batch of 5 Fighter Jets land at Ambala airbase after covering nearly 7,000 Km OneIndia

entry.content: The first batch of five Rafale fighter jets has landed at the Ambala airbase after covering a distance of nearly 7,000 km to join the Indian Air Force fleet. The fleet, comprising three single seater and two twin seater aircraft, will be part of the No. 17 Squadron of the Air Force, also known as the ‘‘Golden Arrows’. Defence Minister Rajnath Singh said in a series of tweets that the The Birds have landed safely in Ambala. The touch down of Rafale combat aircrafts in India marks the beginning of a new era in our Military History. the Indian Air Force tweeted with a photo of the Rafales in "Arrow formation", given a ceremonial welcome by
entry.summary: The first batch of five Rafale fighter jets has landed at the Ambala airbase after covering a distance of nearly 7,000 km to join the Indian Air Force fleet. The fleet, comprising three single seater and two twin seater aircraft, will be part of the No. 17 Squadron of the Air Force, also known as the ‘‘Golden Arrows’. Defence Minister Rajnath Singh said in a series of tweets that the The Birds have landed safely in Ambala. The touch down of Rafale combat aircrafts in India marks the beginning of a new era in our Military History. the Indian Air Force tweeted with a photo of the Rafales in "Arrow formation", given a ceremonial welcome by

entry.title: paRannaGeeVi Third Song ఎవడన్నాడు నేను మనిషినని సాంగ్ Oneindia Telugu

link.title: paRannaGeeVi Third Song ఎవడన్నాడు నేను మనిషినని సాంగ్ Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Making a movie against Pawan Kalyan has irked his fans so much that they are now making a movie on RGV.2 songs are out.. Here is the third song from paRannaGeeVi.
#RGV
#paRannaGeeVi
#paRannaGeeViTrailer
#paRannaGeeVisong
#shakalakashankar
#recklessgeneticvirus
#ramgopalvarma
#powerstarmovie
#powerstar
#pawankalyan
#shreyaset
#pawankalyanfans
పవర్ స్టార్ పేరిట సినిమాను తెరకెక్కిస్తున్న వర్మను సినిమాతోనే దెబ్బ కొట్టాలని భావించిన కొంతమంది పవన్ మద్దతుదారులు.. వర్మపై పరాన్నజీవి అనే సినిమాను తెరకెక్కిస్తున్నారు. పవర్ స్టార్ మూవీ ట్రైలర్ ( Power star trailer ) విడుదలైన మరుసటి రోజే పరాన్న జీవి టీజర్ ( Parannajeevi teaser ) సైతం ఆడియెన్స్ ముందుకు వచ్చింది. ఎవడన్నాడు నేను మనిషినని సాంగ్ కూడా బాగా వైరల్ అవుతుంది.
entry.summary: Making a movie against Pawan Kalyan has irked his fans so much that they are now making a movie on RGV.2 songs are out.. Here is the third song from paRannaGeeVi. #RGV #paRannaGeeVi #paRannaGeeViTrailer #paRannaGeeVisong #shakalakashankar #recklessgeneticvirus #ramgopalvarma #powerstarmovie #powerstar #pawankalyan #shreyaset #pawankalyanfans పవర్ స్టార్ పేరిట సినిమాను తెరకెక్కిస్తున్న వర్మను సినిమాతోనే దెబ్బ కొట్టాలని భావించిన కొంతమంది పవన్ మద్దతుదారులు.. వర్మపై పరాన్నజీవి అనే సినిమాను తెరకెక్కిస్తున్నారు. పవర్ స్టార్ మూవీ ట్రైలర్ ( Power star trailer ) విడుదలైన మరుసటి రోజే పరాన్న జీవి టీజర్ ( Parannajeevi teaser ) సైతం ఆడియెన్స్ ముందుకు వచ్చింది. ఎవడన్నాడు నేను మనిషినని సాంగ్ కూడా బాగా వైరల్ అవుతుంది.

entry.title: Vanitha இழிவுபடுத்தியதை கண்டித்து Lakshmi Legal Notice

link.title: Vanitha இழிவுபடுத்தியதை கண்டித்து Lakshmi Legal Notice

entry.content:
#VanithaVijaykumar
#LakshmiRamakrishnan
நேர்காணலில் தன்னைப்பற்றி ஆபாசமாக பேசிய நடிகை வனிதாவுக்கு லக்ஷ்மி ராமகிருஷ்ணன் நோட்டீஸ் அனுப்பியுள்ளார்.
entry.summary: #VanithaVijaykumar #LakshmiRamakrishnan நேர்காணலில் தன்னைப்பற்றி ஆபாசமாக பேசிய நடிகை வனிதாவுக்கு லக்ஷ்மி ராமகிருஷ்ணன் நோட்டீஸ் அனுப்பியுள்ளார்.

entry.title: The Kissing Booth 2 trailer - Joey King

link.title: The Kissing Booth 2 trailer - Joey King

entry.content:
Elle Evans (Joey King) just had the most romantic summer of her life with her reformed bad-boy boyfriend Noah Flynn (Jacob Elordi). But now Noah is off to Harvard, and Elle heads back to high school for her senior year. She’ll have to juggle a long-distance relationship, getting into her dream college with her best friend Lee (Joel Courtney), and the complications brought on by a close friendship with a handsome, charismatic new classmate named Marco (Taylor Zakhar Perez). When Noah grows close to a seemingly-perfect college girl (Maisie Richardson-Sellers), Elle will have to decide how much she trusts him and to whom her heart truly belongs. Director and screenwriter Vince Marcello returns for The Kissing Booth sequel, based on characters from Beth Reekles’ 2012 young adult book.
The Kissing Booth 2 hits Netflix on 24th July 2020
entry.summary: Elle Evans (Joey King) just had the most romantic summer of her life with her reformed bad-boy boyfriend Noah Flynn (Jacob Elordi). But now Noah is off to Harvard, and Elle heads back to high school for her senior year. She’ll have to juggle a long-distance relationship, getting into her dream college with her best friend Lee (Joel Courtney), and the complications brought on by a close friendship with a handsome, charismatic new classmate named Marco (Taylor Zakhar Perez). When Noah grows close to a seemingly-perfect college girl (Maisie Richardson-Sellers), Elle will have to decide how much she trusts him and to whom her heart truly belongs. Director and screenwriter Vince Marcello returns for The Kissing Booth sequel, based on characters from Beth Reekles’ 2012 young adult book. The Kissing Booth 2 hits Netflix on 24th July 2020

entry.title: The X-Files: Patrick Renna’s SUPERNATURAL ‘Bad Blood’ Experience

link.title: The X-Files: Patrick Renna’s SUPERNATURAL ‘Bad Blood’ Experience

entry.content:

entry.title: Airtel Launches Free Coupons For Prepaid Customers; Offering Data Up To 6GB

link.title: Airtel Launches Free Coupons For Prepaid Customers; Offering Data Up To 6GB

entry.content:
Airtel has launched free coupons for its prepaid customers. The free data coupons are specially designed for those customers who have opted for Rs. 219 or above plans. This means this plan is for selected users only.
► FOLLOW to Gizbot:
► Like us on Facebook:
► Follow us on Twitter:
► Follow us on Instagram:
► Subscribe Gizbot Youtube Channel:
► Follow us on Dailymotion:

entry.summary: Airtel has launched free coupons for its prepaid customers. The free data coupons are specially designed for those customers who have opted for Rs. 219 or above plans. This means this plan is for selected users only. ► FOLLOW to Gizbot: ► Like us on Facebook: ► Follow us on Twitter: ► Follow us on Instagram: ► Subscribe Gizbot Youtube Channel: ► Follow us on Dailymotion: "Music: www.bensound.com"

entry.title: BCCI president and Former Captain Sourav Ganguly has tested negative for Covid-19 वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: BCCI president and Former Captain Sourav Ganguly has tested negative for Covid-19 वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
BCCI president Sourav Ganguly has tested negative for Covid-19 after he gave his samples as a precautionary measure. The former India captain has been in home quarantine for more than a week after his elder brother Snehasish Ganguly had tested positive for the contagious disease.
बीसीसीआई अध्यक्ष और पूर्व भारतीय कप्तान सौरव गांगुली के घर में कोरोना के केस आने के बाद एहतिहात के तौर पर गांगुली ने भी कोरोना जांच के लिए टेस्ट दिया, हालांकि राहत की बात ये रही की कोरोना वायरस जांच में नेगेटिव पाये गए, भारत के पूर्व कप्तान गांगुली पिछले एक हफ्ते से ज्यादा वक्त से होम क्वारंटीन में हैं, उनके बड़े भाई स्नेहाशीष गांगुली कोरोना जांच में पॉजिटिव पाए गए थे।
#BCCIpresident #SouravGanguly #Covid-19
entry.summary: BCCI president Sourav Ganguly has tested negative for Covid-19 after he gave his samples as a precautionary measure. The former India captain has been in home quarantine for more than a week after his elder brother Snehasish Ganguly had tested positive for the contagious disease. बीसीसीआई अध्यक्ष और पूर्व भारतीय कप्तान सौरव गांगुली के घर में कोरोना के केस आने के बाद एहतिहात के तौर पर गांगुली ने भी कोरोना जांच के लिए टेस्ट दिया, हालांकि राहत की बात ये रही की कोरोना वायरस जांच में नेगेटिव पाये गए, भारत के पूर्व कप्तान गांगुली पिछले एक हफ्ते से ज्यादा वक्त से होम क्वारंटीन में हैं, उनके बड़े भाई स्नेहाशीष गांगुली कोरोना जांच में पॉजिटिव पाए गए थे। #BCCIpresident #SouravGanguly #Covid-19

entry.title: NEWS: Keeping the retail momentum on Bursa going

link.title: NEWS: Keeping the retail momentum on Bursa going

entry.content: As retailers return to the stock market in droves, Bursa Malaysia CEO Datuk Muhamad Umar Swift explains how the bourse intends to keep their interest.
entry.summary: As retailers return to the stock market in droves, Bursa Malaysia CEO Datuk Muhamad Umar Swift explains how the bourse intends to keep their interest.

entry.title: China पर एक और Digital strike, 47 Apps पर फिर लगाया बैन

link.title: China पर एक और Digital strike, 47 Apps पर फिर लगाया बैन

entry.content:
भारत ने और 47 चीनी ऐप्स पर बैन लगाने का फैसला किया है। ये ऐप्स कुछ समय पहले बैन किए गए ऐप्स के क्लोन के तौर पर काम कर रहे थे। इनमें टिकटॉक, वी चैट से लेकर अली बाबा के ऐप्स यूसी न्यूज और यूसी ब्राउजर शामिल हैं। ये चीनी ऐप्स राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा के लिए खतरनाक हैं। साथ ही कुछ ऐप डेटा शेयरिंग और प्राइवेसी के नियमों का उल्लंघन कर रही थीं।
चीन से सीमा पर तनाव के बाद सरकार ने इससे पहले 59 ऐप्स बैन किए हैं जिनमें कई लोकप्रिय ऐप्स शामिल थे। खबरों के अनुसार भारत सरकार ने 200 से ज्यादा चीनी ऐप्स की नई सूची तैयार की जा रही है और इसमें कुछ गेमिंग ऐप्स भी शामिल हैं, जिनमें PUBG और
अली एक्सप्रेस जैसे लोकप्रिय गेम भी हैं। भारत में इन गेमिंग ऐप्स के करोड़ों यूजर्स हैं। खबरों के अनुसार चीनी ऐप्स का लगातार रिव्यू किया जा रहा है और ये भी पता लगाने की कोशिश की जा रही है कि उन्हें फंडिंग कहां से हो रही है?
खबरों के अनुसार भारत सरकार अब ऐप्स के लिए नियम बना रही है, जिनका पालन सभी को करना होगा। अगर ऐसा नहीं होता है तो उन ऐप्स पर बैन होने का खतरा रहेगा।
साइबर सिक्योरिटी को मजबूत बनाने और भारतीय नागरिकों के डेटा को सिक्योर करने के लिए भारत सरकार ने बड़ा प्लान बनाया है।
entry.summary: भारत ने और 47 चीनी ऐप्स पर बैन लगाने का फैसला किया है। ये ऐप्स कुछ समय पहले बैन किए गए ऐप्स के क्लोन के तौर पर काम कर रहे थे। इनमें टिकटॉक, वी चैट से लेकर अली बाबा के ऐप्स यूसी न्यूज और यूसी ब्राउजर शामिल हैं। ये चीनी ऐप्स राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा के लिए खतरनाक हैं। साथ ही कुछ ऐप डेटा शेयरिंग और प्राइवेसी के नियमों का उल्लंघन कर रही थीं। चीन से सीमा पर तनाव के बाद सरकार ने इससे पहले 59 ऐप्स बैन किए हैं जिनमें कई लोकप्रिय ऐप्स शामिल थे। खबरों के अनुसार भारत सरकार ने 200 से ज्यादा चीनी ऐप्स की नई सूची तैयार की जा रही है और इसमें कुछ गेमिंग ऐप्स भी शामिल हैं, जिनमें PUBG और अली एक्सप्रेस जैसे लोकप्रिय गेम भी हैं। भारत में इन गेमिंग ऐप्स के करोड़ों यूजर्स हैं। खबरों के अनुसार चीनी ऐप्स का लगातार रिव्यू किया जा रहा है और ये भी पता लगाने की कोशिश की जा रही है कि उन्हें फंडिंग कहां से हो रही है? खबरों के अनुसार भारत सरकार अब ऐप्स के लिए नियम बना रही है, जिनका पालन सभी को करना होगा। अगर ऐसा नहीं होता है तो उन ऐप्स पर बैन होने का खतरा रहेगा। साइबर सिक्योरिटी को मजबूत बनाने और भारतीय नागरिकों के डेटा को सिक्योर करने के लिए भारत सरकार ने बड़ा प्लान बनाया है।

entry.title: Rajnath Singh and 3 service chiefs pay tribute to soldiers at National War Memorial Oneindia News

link.title: Rajnath Singh and 3 service chiefs pay tribute to soldiers at National War Memorial Oneindia News

entry.content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, MoS Defence Shripad Naik and three service chiefs pay tribute at the National War Memorial on the 21st anniversary of India’s victory in the Kargil War. The nation is observing the 21st anniversary of Kargil Vijay Diwas on 26th July, remembering its brave martyrs who sacrificed their lives to uphold and safeguard the integrity of the nation. This day commemorates the success of Operation Vijay which was launched by the Indian Army to recapture the Indian territories captured by the Pakistani intruders in the Kargil-Drass sector in 1999.
entry.summary: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh, MoS Defence Shripad Naik and three service chiefs pay tribute at the National War Memorial on the 21st anniversary of India’s victory in the Kargil War. The nation is observing the 21st anniversary of Kargil Vijay Diwas on 26th July, remembering its brave martyrs who sacrificed their lives to uphold and safeguard the integrity of the nation. This day commemorates the success of Operation Vijay which was launched by the Indian Army to recapture the Indian territories captured by the Pakistani intruders in the Kargil-Drass sector in 1999.

entry.title: Stonebwoy - Digital FADER FORT 2

link.title: Stonebwoy - Digital FADER FORT 2

entry.content: Coming off the release of his globally massive new record Anloga Junction, Ghanaian artist Stonebwoy had to swing by digital FORT to explain the significance of his newest single and video. “Le Gba Gbe is a word that means alive," he explains. "This song is inspired by the quest for freedom. This song speaks about liberation. This song points at the struggles that we face emotionally, mentally, and physically as people while we’re alive." Watch the "Le Gba Gbe" video below, and stay tuned for more on the way from Stonebwoy.
entry.summary: Coming off the release of his globally massive new record Anloga Junction, Ghanaian artist Stonebwoy had to swing by digital FORT to explain the significance of his newest single and video. “Le Gba Gbe is a word that means alive," he explains. "This song is inspired by the quest for freedom. This song speaks about liberation. This song points at the struggles that we face emotionally, mentally, and physically as people while we’re alive." Watch the "Le Gba Gbe" video below, and stay tuned for more on the way from Stonebwoy.

entry.title: Happy Birthday Sir Garry Sobers: 4 Records Held By Legendary Cricketer

link.title: Happy Birthday Sir Garry Sobers: 4 Records Held By Legendary Cricketer

entry.content:
Garfield Sobers or Sir Gary Sobers, the former West Indies cricketer was born on July 28, 1936, and is regarded as the greatest all-rounder to have played the game of cricket. Sir Gary Sobers made his Test debut against England at Kingston in 1954. He went on to play 93 Tests and scored 8032 runs at an impressive average of 57.78. The left-handed batsman scored 26 centuries and 30 half-centuries during his Test career. With the ball in hand, he picked 235 wickets. Sir Gary Sobers, however, played just one ODI and that was against England in 1974. As the legendary cricketer turns 84 today, we take a look at some of the records he holds.
#SirGarrySobers #BirthdaySpecial
Link:
Subscribe:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Instagram:
entry.summary: Garfield Sobers or Sir Gary Sobers, the former West Indies cricketer was born on July 28, 1936, and is regarded as the greatest all-rounder to have played the game of cricket. Sir Gary Sobers made his Test debut against England at Kingston in 1954. He went on to play 93 Tests and scored 8032 runs at an impressive average of 57.78. The left-handed batsman scored 26 centuries and 30 half-centuries during his Test career. With the ball in hand, he picked 235 wickets. Sir Gary Sobers, however, played just one ODI and that was against England in 1974. As the legendary cricketer turns 84 today, we take a look at some of the records he holds. #SirGarrySobers #BirthdaySpecial Link: Subscribe: Facebook: Twitter: Instagram:

entry.title: Duterte claims ‘gasoline, diesel can disinfect masks’

link.title: Duterte claims ‘gasoline, diesel can disinfect masks’

entry.content:
President Rodrigo Duterte advised the public in a speech aired on Tuesday, July 21, to reuse face masks by disinfecting them with alcohol or Lysol – or in the absence of such, soak it in gasoline or diesel."
There is no proof that gasoline or diesel can disinfect surfaces, skin, or even masks. Inhaling and having prolonged contact with gasoline can be harmful to one’s health.
Read the full #FactCheck on
entry.summary: President Rodrigo Duterte advised the public in a speech aired on Tuesday, July 21, to reuse face masks by disinfecting them with alcohol or Lysol – or in the absence of such, soak it in gasoline or diesel." There is no proof that gasoline or diesel can disinfect surfaces, skin, or even masks. Inhaling and having prolonged contact with gasoline can be harmful to one’s health. Read the full #FactCheck on

entry.title: Helina Anti tank Missile, Indian Army Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Helina Anti tank Missile, Indian Army Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಭಾರತದ ಸೇನೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವೆಲ್ಲ ಅಸ್ತ್ರಗಳಿವೆ ಅನ್ನೋದನ್ನು ತಿಳಿದುಕೊಳ್ಳೋದು ಬಹಳ ಮುಖ್ಯ . ಭಾರತ ಹೆಮ್ಮೆಯ ಹೆಲೀನಾ ಅಸ್ತ್ರದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಈ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ದಲ್ಲಿ ತಿಳಿದುಕೊಳ್ಳೋಣ
Indian Military is one of the strongest Militaries in the world . Today we learn about Helina which is our pride
entry.summary: ಭಾರತದ ಸೇನೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಯಾವೆಲ್ಲ ಅಸ್ತ್ರಗಳಿವೆ ಅನ್ನೋದನ್ನು ತಿಳಿದುಕೊಳ್ಳೋದು ಬಹಳ ಮುಖ್ಯ . ಭಾರತ ಹೆಮ್ಮೆಯ ಹೆಲೀನಾ ಅಸ್ತ್ರದ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಈ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ದಲ್ಲಿ ತಿಳಿದುಕೊಳ್ಳೋಣ Indian Military is one of the strongest Militaries in the world . Today we learn about Helina which is our pride

entry.title: இன்று தமிழகத்திலிருந்து வரும் வாகனங்களுக்கு கர்நாடகத்தில் அனுமதி இல்லை!

link.title: இன்று தமிழகத்திலிருந்து வரும் வாகனங்களுக்கு கர்நாடகத்தில் அனுமதி இல்லை!

entry.content:
ஓசூர்: கர்நாடகாவில் இன்று 4 வது ஞாயிற்றுக்கிழமை முழு ஊரடங்கு அமல்படுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளதால் தமிழகத்திலிருந்து கர்நாடகா செல்லும் வாகனங்கள் திருப்பி அனுப்பி வைக்கப்பட்டது. இதையும் மீறி செல்பவர்கள் மீது போலீஸார் தடியடி நடத்தியதால் பரபரப்பு ஏற்பட்டது.
Today there will be no entry for vehicles which are coming from TN to KA
entry.summary: ஓசூர்: கர்நாடகாவில் இன்று 4 வது ஞாயிற்றுக்கிழமை முழு ஊரடங்கு அமல்படுத்தப்பட்டுள்ளதால் தமிழகத்திலிருந்து கர்நாடகா செல்லும் வாகனங்கள் திருப்பி அனுப்பி வைக்கப்பட்டது. இதையும் மீறி செல்பவர்கள் மீது போலீஸார் தடியடி நடத்தியதால் பரபரப்பு ஏற்பட்டது. Today there will be no entry for vehicles which are coming from TN to KA

entry.title: Manoj Tiwari shared his rection after watching Sushant Singh’s last flim Dil Bechara वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Manoj Tiwari shared his rection after watching Sushant Singh’s last flim Dil Bechara वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Manoj Tiwari shared his rection after watching Sushant Singh’s last flim Dil Bechara. Indian cricketer Manoj Tiwary tweeted Watched #DilBechara yesterday. I believe it was an instant connection with the movie Clapper board Outstanding display of acting skills by d actors, beautiful movie and a msg for everyone. Cried while watching d movie for various reasons. Blockbuster it is.
दिवंगत अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की आखिरी फिल्म दिल बेचारा को फैंस का अपार प्यार मिला है. भारतीय टीम के पूर्व कप्तान एमएस धोनी के जीवन पर आधारित बनी फिल्म में माही का रोल अदा करने वाले सुशांत सिंह राजपूत के जीवन की आखिरी फिल्म ‘दिल बेचारा’ हाल ही में ओटीटी प्लेटफॉर्म हॉटस्टार पर रिलीज हुई है। फिल्म के रिलीज होने के साथ इस फिल्म ने कई बड़े रिकॉर्ड को चकनाचूर कर दिया।
#ManojTiwary #DilBechara #SushantSingh
entry.summary: Manoj Tiwari shared his rection after watching Sushant Singh’s last flim Dil Bechara. Indian cricketer Manoj Tiwary tweeted Watched #DilBechara yesterday. I believe it was an instant connection with the movie Clapper board Outstanding display of acting skills by d actors, beautiful movie and a msg for everyone. Cried while watching d movie for various reasons. Blockbuster it is. दिवंगत अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की आखिरी फिल्म दिल बेचारा को फैंस का अपार प्यार मिला है. भारतीय टीम के पूर्व कप्तान एमएस धोनी के जीवन पर आधारित बनी फिल्म में माही का रोल अदा करने वाले सुशांत सिंह राजपूत के जीवन की आखिरी फिल्म ‘दिल बेचारा’ हाल ही में ओटीटी प्लेटफॉर्म हॉटस्टार पर रिलीज हुई है। फिल्म के रिलीज होने के साथ इस फिल्म ने कई बड़े रिकॉर्ड को चकनाचूर कर दिया। #ManojTiwary #DilBechara #SushantSingh

entry.title: Bea Alonzo says buyers want her fan pages, Angel Locsin to fellow celebrities: ‘Speak up’

link.title: Bea Alonzo says buyers want her fan pages, Angel Locsin to fellow celebrities: ‘Speak up’

entry.content:
ABS-CBN star Bea Alonzo says she received reports from her fans that unknown persons offered to buy her fan pages for undisclosed amounts. Actress Angel Locsin urges her fellow celebrities to use their voices to amplify those of their fellow media workers who helped bring them fame.
Read:
entry.summary: ABS-CBN star Bea Alonzo says she received reports from her fans that unknown persons offered to buy her fan pages for undisclosed amounts. Actress Angel Locsin urges her fellow celebrities to use their voices to amplify those of their fellow media workers who helped bring them fame. Read:

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Suicide Case: Mahesh Bhatt से Mumbai Police ने 2 घंटे तक की पूछताछ वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Suicide Case: Mahesh Bhatt से Mumbai Police ने 2 घंटे तक की पूछताछ वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Mumbai Police investigation is going on in actor Sushant Singh Rajput suicide case. Big celebrities of Bollywood have been questioned. In this episode, today, the statement of producer-director Mahesh Bhatt has been recorded at Santacruz police station on Monday. Mahesh Bhatt reached the police station at around 12 noon. He was questioned for about 2 hours. However, no information related to what Mahesh Bhatt has told the police in the inquiry could not be revealed.
अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत आत्महत्या मामले में मुंबई पुलिस की जांच जारी है. बॉलीवुड की बड़ी बड़ी हस्तियों से पूछताछ की जा चुकी है. इस कड़ी में आज यानी सोमवार को सांताक्रुज थाने में निर्माता- निर्देशक महेश भट्ट का बयान दर्ज किया गया है. महेश भट्ट करीब 12 बजे पुलिस स्टेशन पहुंचे थे. उनसे करीब 2 घंटे तक पूछताछ की गई. हालांकि पूछताछ में महेश भट्ट ने पुलिस को क्या बताया है इससे जुड़ी कोई जानकारी सामने नहीं आ सकी है.
#SushantSinghRajputCase #MaheshBhatt #MumbaiPolice
entry.summary: Mumbai Police investigation is going on in actor Sushant Singh Rajput suicide case. Big celebrities of Bollywood have been questioned. In this episode, today, the statement of producer-director Mahesh Bhatt has been recorded at Santacruz police station on Monday. Mahesh Bhatt reached the police station at around 12 noon. He was questioned for about 2 hours. However, no information related to what Mahesh Bhatt has told the police in the inquiry could not be revealed. अभिनेता सुशांत सिंह राजपूत आत्महत्या मामले में मुंबई पुलिस की जांच जारी है. बॉलीवुड की बड़ी बड़ी हस्तियों से पूछताछ की जा चुकी है. इस कड़ी में आज यानी सोमवार को सांताक्रुज थाने में निर्माता- निर्देशक महेश भट्ट का बयान दर्ज किया गया है. महेश भट्ट करीब 12 बजे पुलिस स्टेशन पहुंचे थे. उनसे करीब 2 घंटे तक पूछताछ की गई. हालांकि पूछताछ में महेश भट्ट ने पुलिस को क्या बताया है इससे जुड़ी कोई जानकारी सामने नहीं आ सकी है. #SushantSinghRajputCase #MaheshBhatt #MumbaiPolice

entry.title: Corona Medicine:बाजार में जल्द आएगी कोरोना की सबसे सस्ती दवा, DCGI से मिली अनुमति वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Corona Medicine:बाजार में जल्द आएगी कोरोना की सबसे सस्ती दवा, DCGI से मिली अनुमति वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The cases of corona are increasing in the country and the world … The biggest reason for the outbreak of this epidemic is that its medicine has not been able to be invented till now. But now it is being said that Corona has become the cheapest medicine for the virus. He has also got permission to bring it to the market. According to a report, the drug company has received permission from the Drug Controller General of India, ie DCGI, to bring this drug into the market. One tablet of this medicine will be available for only 59 rupees.
देश और दुनिया में कोरोना के मामले लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं…इस महामारी के फैलने का सबसे बड़ा कारण ये है कि अब तक इसकी दवा इजाद नहीं हो सकी है.दुनिया भर में मेडिसिन क्षेत्र के वैज्ञानिक इसकी कारगर दवाई बनाने में जुटे हुए हैं लेकिन अब कहा जा रहा है कि कोरोना वायरस की सबसे सस्ती दवा बन चुकी है. उसे बाजार में लाने की अनुमति भी मिल गई है. एक रिपोर्ट के मुताबिक इस दवा को बाजार में लाने के लिए ड्रग्स कंट्रोलर जनरल ऑफ इंडिया यानि की DCGI से दवा कंपनी को अनुमति मिल चुकी है. इस दवा की एक टैबलेट मात्र 59 रुपए में मिलेगी
#Coronavirus #Covid19
entry.summary: The cases of corona are increasing in the country and the world … The biggest reason for the outbreak of this epidemic is that its medicine has not been able to be invented till now. But now it is being said that Corona has become the cheapest medicine for the virus. He has also got permission to bring it to the market. According to a report, the drug company has received permission from the Drug Controller General of India, ie DCGI, to bring this drug into the market. One tablet of this medicine will be available for only 59 rupees. देश और दुनिया में कोरोना के मामले लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं…इस महामारी के फैलने का सबसे बड़ा कारण ये है कि अब तक इसकी दवा इजाद नहीं हो सकी है.दुनिया भर में मेडिसिन क्षेत्र के वैज्ञानिक इसकी कारगर दवाई बनाने में जुटे हुए हैं लेकिन अब कहा जा रहा है कि कोरोना वायरस की सबसे सस्ती दवा बन चुकी है. उसे बाजार में लाने की अनुमति भी मिल गई है. एक रिपोर्ट के मुताबिक इस दवा को बाजार में लाने के लिए ड्रग्स कंट्रोलर जनरल ऑफ इंडिया यानि की DCGI से दवा कंपनी को अनुमति मिल चुकी है. इस दवा की एक टैबलेट मात्र 59 रुपए में मिलेगी #Coronavirus #Covid19
